rounds.features: Puzzle mode (5 levels), 2 new enemy types (patrol + teleporter), 50 achievements (up from 40), Pause panel, Achievements panel, Power-ups HUD, Level transition panel, high score persistence (localStorage), neon arena border walls, enemy death particles, teleport effects, fuse spark animation, combo sound feedback, exit tiles for puzzle mode, enemy HP system, fastest/survival time tracking, save settings

Environmental hazards: laser beams (warning+fire cycle, damage player/enemies, row/col patterns), conveyor belts (push entities), danger zone indicators (show bomb blast radius preview), score multiplier system (kills build x1-x8 multi), player trail effect (fading cyan trail), starfield background (120 animated stars), How to Play panel with controls/tips, expanded to 60 achievements (Quad Damage, Octakill, Laser Dodger, etc.), laser/conveyor/multiplier SFX, improved HUD with multiplier display

Bomb kick mechanic (BombKick power-up, sliding bomb physics), warp portals (paired teleport tiles from level 5+, cooldown system), score popup floating numbers (visual feedback for kills/blocks), achievement unlock notifications (head-locked PanelUI panel with sound), power-up collection particle burst effect, 70 achievements (5 new: Kick Start/Warp Drive/Half Million/Hex Damage/Transcendent), 10 PanelUI panels, ASCII-clean glyphs
